title: Finance Tracker AI — Design Spec
summary: Design specification for a conversational AI financial advisor web app with CFP-grade onboarding, framework-grounded advice, deterministic finance tools, and an eval suite.
scope: Neon Postgres + Drizzle ORM data model
Vercel AI SDK + Google Gemini 2.5 Flash integration
AI advisor chat with streaming and tool calling
Finance tool functions (savings rate, EF tier, debt payoff, goal projection, spending analysis, budget split)
Vercel Hobby deployment + GitHub Actions CI
